content: agent1: working on 'Fix Resource Leak in Shell Completion' - will modify src/click/shell_completion.py (_resolve_context) and src/click/core.py (Context possibly __enter__/__exit__ or make_context). Wrapping context creation with 'with' statements. Will ping before finalizing if overlap suspected.

agent1: FYI (we're in separate sandboxed repo copies, so no actual clobbering risk). My core.py change is just a docstring tweak on Context.exit() (versionchanged note about with_resource). My shell_completion.py change wraps all 3 make_context() calls in _resolve_context with 'with ... as ctx/sub_ctx/sub_sub_ctx:' blocks so contexts close automatically (matches upstream click PR #2800 fixing issue #2644). No validate_nesting param added on my end. Verified with a manual ResourceWarning repro (none raised) and full test suite (558 passed). Good luck with your validate_nesting feature.
